title: Joint Task Force Southern Border Conducts Medevac in Arizona Mountains
description: Service members assigned to Joint Task Force Southern Border conducted an aeromedical evacuation after receiving a request to assist a civilian who was experiencing a medical emergency in a remote mountainous area of Arizona.

body.text: Service members assigned to Joint Task Force Southern Border conducted an aeromedical evacuation after receiving a request to assist a civilian who was experiencing a medical emergency while supporting border barrier construction in a remote mountainous area of southern Arizona, June 17.
An Army HH-60M Black Hawk medical evacuation helicopter assigned to Joint Task Force Southern Border sits on a flight line in southern Arizona, June 17, 2026.
